center.name: 棉兰老岛
center.summary: 棉兰老岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、菲律宾针尾雨燕、Philippine eagle-owl等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: talautensis, is native to the Visayas and Mindanao island groups of the Philippines, with a range extending to the Talaud Islands of Indonesia. T

birds.evidence: To be precise, it inhabits islands such as Negros, Cebu, Camiguin Sur, Mindanao and many other small islands in the central and southern Philippines IUCN has assessed this bird as least-concern species but the population is decreasing

birds.evidence: The southern silvery kingfisher (Ceyx argentatus) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is endemic to the Philippines found in Mindanao and Basilan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: obscurior | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Orthotomus | species = cinereiceps | authority = Sharpe, 1877 | synonyms = }} The white-eared tailorbird (Orthotomus cinereiceps) is a species of bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, it but now placed in the family Cisticolidae.It is found in the Philippine islands of Basilan and West Mindanao

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Indonesia, it occurs in Sumatra, Simeulue and Mentawai off the west side and Riau, Bangka Island and Belitung, Java, Borneo; and the western and southern Philippines on Palawan, Calamian Islands, Lubang Island, Mindoro, Mindanao and Bohol. The changeable hawk-eagle inhabits savannawoodland, agricultural land, wetlands, tea plantations, forest villages and even suburbs

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Mindanao hornbill (Penelopides affinis), also known as the Mindanao tarictic hornbill, is a medium-small species of hornbill found in the canopy of rainforests on Mindanao, Dinagat, Siargao and Basilan in the southern Philippines
